summary: Verify and complete the React dashboard for OpenPrint Cloud print management platform. The diagnosis shows tsx_files: 0 but the actual codebase has 100+ TSX files with a working build (1056 modules, 881.57 kB bundle). TypeScript type-check passes, all required components exist (LoginForm, JobList, Devices, Documents, Dashboard, Settings). The main issues are: diagnosis inaccuracy, missing axios dependency (code uses fetch API), and no API gateway on port 8000 (direct service proxying configured).

user_stories.i_want: verify the React dashboard build and deployment configuration
user_stories.so_that: the frontend can be deployed and connect to backend services correctly
acceptance_criteria: npm install completes without errors
npm run build completes successfully
TypeScript type-check passes with no errors
Dashboard starts on port 3000
All routes load without console errors

user_stories.i_want: correct the diagnosis file to accurately reflect the TSX file count
acceptance_criteria: Diagnosis shows correct tsx_files count (>100)
frontend_files score updated from 0 to accurate value
completion percentage recalculated

user_stories.i_want: the dashboard to connect to backend services through a unified API gateway
user_stories.so_that: service routing is centralized and manageable
acceptance_criteria: API gateway service exists on port 8000
All API calls proxy through /api/v1 prefix
Service routing configured (auth, jobs, printers, etc.)

user_stories.i_want: to authenticate and access protected dashboard pages
user_stories.so_that: I can manage print jobs and devices
acceptance_criteria: Login form renders correctly
Authentication stores JWT tokens
Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to login
Dashboard loads after successful authentication

user_stories.i_want: view and manage print jobs through the dashboard
user_stories.so_that: I can submit, cancel, and monitor print jobs
acceptance_criteria: Job list displays all print jobs
Job status badges show current state
Create job form accepts document uploads
Cancel and retry actions work correctly

user_stories.i_want: manage printers and devices through the dashboard
user_stories.so_that: I can monitor and configure the print fleet
acceptance_criteria: Device list shows all registered printers
Device cards display status and health
Device detail page shows configuration
Device registration form works

user_stories.i_want: upload and manage documents for printing
user_stories.so_that: I can submit documents to the print queue
acceptance_criteria: Document upload accepts PDF and image files
Document list shows uploaded files
Document viewer previews files
Upload progress indicator displays

functional_requirements.title: Dashboard Build Verification
functional_requirements.description: Verify the React dashboard builds successfully with all dependencies installed. The build currently produces a 881.57 kB bundle from 1056 modules.

functional_requirements.title: API Client Configuration
functional_requirements.description: The dashboard uses fetch API for HTTP requests. All API calls go through /api/v1 prefix with service-specific routing in vite.config.ts. No axios dependency needed.

functional_requirements.title: Authentication Flow
functional_requirements.description: JWT-based authentication with token storage in localStorage. Automatic token refresh on 401 responses. Protected routes redirect to /login.

functional_requirements.title: Job Management UI
functional_requirements.description: Job list, create job form, job details, status badges, cancel and retry actions. Integrates with job-service on port 8003.

functional_requirements.title: Device Management UI
functional_requirements.description: Device list, device cards, device detail, device registration. Integrates with registry-service on port 8002.

functional_requirements.title: Document Management UI
functional_requirements.description: Document upload, document list, document viewer, file validation. Integrates with storage-service on port 8004.

functional_requirements.title: Settings Pages
functional_requirements.description: Profile settings, organization settings, security settings with form validation and API integration.

functional_requirements.title: Analytics Dashboard
functional_requirements.description: Stat cards, job charts with recharts, recent activity feed, environment report.

functional_requirements.title: Print Quota & Cost Management
functional_requirements.description: User/department-level quotas, chargeback to cost centers, prepaid printing balances
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Essential for enterprise cost control - blockers for adoption

functional_requirements.title: Secure Print Release
functional_requirements.description: Hold jobs until user authenticates at device via PIN, badge, or mobile

functional_requirements.title: Mobile Print App
functional_requirements.description: Native iOS/Android apps with document capture and print release
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: PaperCut Mobility competitor - huge BYOD market

functional_requirements.title: Advanced Reporting
functional_requirements.description: Scheduled reports, custom dashboards, export to CSV/PDF, cost analysis

functional_requirements.title: Document Watermarking
functional_requirements.description: Optional watermarks for secure documents (confidential, draft, etc.)

functional_requirements.title: API Gateway + Developer Portal
functional_requirements.description: Centralized API management with documentation and rate limiting

non_functional_requirements.metric: Current bundle 881.57 kB - consider code splitting
Tokens stored in localStorage with HTTPS required

api_endpoints.description: User login with email and password

risks.risk: Diagnosis file shows incorrect tsx_files count (0 vs 100+ actual)
risks.mitigation: Update diagnosis scanning logic to correctly count .tsx files in web/dashboard/src

risks.risk: No API gateway on port 8000 - vite proxies directly to services
risks.mitigation: Either implement API gateway service or update documentation to reflect direct service access pattern

risks.risk: Large bundle size (881.57 kB) may affect initial load time
risks.mitigation: Implement dynamic imports and code splitting for routes

risks.risk: axios is mentioned in CLAUDE.md but not in package.json
risks.mitigation: Update documentation to reflect fetch API usage or add axios if preferred

risks.risk: JWT tokens stored in localStorage may be vulnerable to XSS
risks.mitigation: Consider httpOnly cookie implementation for production

implementation_phases.name: Verify Build Status
tasks: Run npm install to verify dependencies
Run npm run type-check to verify TypeScript
Run npm run build to verify production build
Verify dashboard starts on port 3000 with npm run dev

implementation_phases.name: Correct Diagnosis
tasks: Update diagnosis.json with correct tsx_files count

implementation_phases.name: Documentation Updates
tasks: Update CLAUDE.md to remove axios reference or add it
Document API gateway vs direct proxy architecture

implementation_phases.name: Optional Optimizations
tasks: Implement code splitting with dynamic imports
Consider httpOnly cookies for JWT storage

key_gaps: Print quota and cost allocation management
Advanced reporting with export and scheduling
Secure print release with card/biometric authentication
unique_selling_points: Open-source microservices architecture with no vendor lock-in
True cloud-native design (not migrated on-prem software)
Pluggable storage backends (S3, MinIO, local) for flexible deployment
Modern tech stack (Go 1.24, React, TypeScript, Vite) vs legacy competitors
Self-hostable with minimal infrastructure compared to enterprise competitors
OIDC/SAML support for modern identity providers out of the box
